full_text:
Huo Du 霍篤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huo Du (霍篤)was born in Nan. Had a few hundred followers, he died young and his brother inherited his troops. Huo Du was affiliated with Liu Biao. Huo Du lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
